MODULE: cosmos.integration.channels.channel_hub
FILE: cosmos/integration/channels/channel_hub.py (759 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Channel Hub - Universal Multi-Channel Manager
=========================================================

Central hub for managing all messaging channel integrations.

Responsibilities:
- Channel lifecycle management (connect/disconnect)
- Message normalization across platforms
- Routing inbou

CLASSES:
- ChannelType(Enum): Supported channel types.
- AccessPolicy(Enum): Channel access control policies.
- ActivationMode(Enum): Group activation modes.
- ChannelMessage: Normalized message format across all channels.

All channel adapters convert pla
  Methods: def to_prompt_context(self) -> str
- ChannelConfig: Configuration for a channel.
- PairingCode: Pairing code for user authentication.
- BaseChannel(ABC): Abstract base class for all channel adapters.

Each channel implementation must 
  Methods: def is_connected(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect(self)
  Methods: async def send_message(self, chat_id: str, text: str, media_path: Optional[str]=None, reply_to: Opti
  Methods: def set_message_callback(self, callback: Callable[[ChannelMessage], Any])
- ChannelHub: Central hub managing all channel connections.

Provides:
- Unified channel manag
  Methods: async def initialize(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def register_channel(self, channel_type: ChannelType, channel: BaseChannel, config: ChannelCon
  Methods: async def connect_channel(self, channel_type: ChannelType) -> bool
  Methods: async def disconnect_channel(self, channel_type: ChannelType)
  Methods: async def connect_all(self)
  Methods: async def disconnect_all(self)
  Methods: def add_message_handler(self, handler: Callable[[ChannelMessage], Any])
  Methods: async def send_message(self, channel_type: ChannelType, chat_id: str, text: str, media_path: Optiona

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_channel_hub() -> ChannelHub
